form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.78) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 13 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Last start finished last on April 2 over 400m at this track behind Nakita Moira beaten 12 lengths (23.86) in a Grade 5. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on and lost ground rounding the turn out of the back straight.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Maitland (23.45) in a Grade 5, finishing a 12 length seventh. Yet to win but has placed five times from this draw. Can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 2 length fourth (23.20) over 400m at this track. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 400m. Last start finished 6th on April 2 over 400m at this track behind Nakita Moira beaten 7 lengths (23.56) in a Grade 5. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Hasn't threatened at his last couple but he does have good record over this track and distance. Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (15.99) at this track in a Grade 3/4, finishing fifth and beaten 3.5 lengths. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from two starts. Has ability and looks a key chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began on terms; Came together and was checked as a consequence.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 272m at this track. Would be better placed in something easier.
